lines.speaker: High Priest
lines.text: Many greetings. Welcome to our fair island.

lines.speaker: High Priest
lines.text: Enjoy your stay here. May it be spiritually uplifting!

lines.speaker: High Priest
lines.text: Many greetings. Welcome to our fair island.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any more paint?

lines.speaker: High Priest
lines.text: Certainly. How much do you want?

lines.speaker: High Priest
lines.text: Enjoy your stay here. May it be spiritually uplifting!

sections.title: Delivering the Holy sheet to the Priest

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, I have something you might be interested in...

lines.speaker: High Priest
lines.text: Ah! A blessed sheet! This is perfect, I've been feeling rather cold the last few nights! As a token of my gratitude, I'm sure we can spare some paint for you.

lines.speaker: High Priest
lines.text: If you'd like more paint, please ask for it. I'm sure we can spare you some.

lines.speaker: High Priest
lines.text: Many greetings. Welcome to our fair island.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've got a message for you from the Wise Old Man in Draynor Village.

lines.speaker: High Priest
lines.text: How kind of you to bring me a message to this remote island!

lines.speaker: High Priest
lines.text: I don't have much in the way of wealth, but I can spare you a few coins for your trouble.

lines.speaker: High Priest
lines.text: In the name of Saradomin I shall bless you...

lines.speaker: High Priest
lines.text: Here, let me give you some herbs.

lines.speaker: High Priest
lines.text: The beasts which dwell under this island occasionally drop gems when they die - please take this one as a sign of my gratitude.

lines.speaker: High Priest
lines.text: Enjoy your stay here. May it be spiritually uplifting!

sections.title: Using any other items on the High Priest

lines.speaker: High Priest
lines.text: No thank you, I am not accepting donations for the church at this time.
